issues: The draft describes the page generically as a Panthers vs. Rangers preview/roster article, but the Sockeyes-relevant content is a separate sidebar titled 'Panthers promote Tomlinson' about ex-Sockeye Dave Tomlinson being recalled from the Cincinnati Cyclones to the Florida Panthers — this is the content the description should focus on.
The draft headline is listed as <UNKNOWN> but the OCR clearly contains the headline 'Panthers promote Tomlinson'.
The draft's short and long descriptions do not mention Dave Tomlinson at all, missing the archive-relevant content entirely.
The long description's detail about Stu Barnes and Keith Brown injuries is accurate context but should be framed around Tomlinson's recall rather than as the primary focus.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: South Florida Sun Sentinel sidebar reporting that the Florida Panthers recalled ex-Richmond Sockeyes center Dave Tomlinson from the Cincinnati Cyclones (IHL Eastern Division scoring leader) to replace injured center Stu Barnes.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: A February 21, 1995 sidebar in the South Florida Sun Sentinel reports that the Florida Panthers recalled center Dave Tomlinson from the Cincinnati Cyclones of the IHL, where he led the Eastern Division with 79 points (28 goals, 51 assists) and was a plus-19. Tomlinson was brought up to replace Stu Barnes, sidelined about a week with an eye injury suffered against Ottawa. The page also includes a full Florida Panthers vs. New York Rangers game preview with rosters for both teams, in which Tomlinson appears on the Florida roster at number 17.
review.notes: Dave Tomlinson is a former Richmond Sockeyes player (1986-87 roster). The archive-relevant content is the 'Panthers promote Tomlinson' sidebar and his appearance on the Florida roster, not the general Panthers-Rangers preview. The viewer URL also confirms the search terms were 'Dave Tomlinson' and 'Maple Leafs', consistent with his NHL career history mentioned in the sidebar.
